page_content:
Courses in 2025-2026 Academic Catalog - DRAFT COPY 401

RUSS303 Russian Conversation: Functional Skills (3 Credits) Intended for students who do not anticipate having the opportunity to study in Russia. Skills for daily life (both function and etiquette) and argumentation (rhetoric).

Prerequisite: RUSS202; or students who have taken courses with comparable content may contact the department.
